name: Mountainous Terrain RTL Profile Tuning
description: You are a UAV Safety Officer preparing an ArduCopter vehicle for a geological survey in a steep mountainous valley. Read the operations safety brief at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/mountain_ops_brief.txt to understand the terrain risks and required parameter configurations. Configure the following 6 ArduPilot failsafe and return parameters to the exact values mandated in the brief: TERRAIN_ENABLE, RTL_ALT, RTL_CLIMB_MIN, RTL_SPEED, RTL_ALT_FINAL, and FS_GCS_ENABLE.
